title: Picture Perfect
description: A better way to see, share and organise your pictures!
body:
# Picture Perfect Do you want to see your pictures, but you don't like diving into the games files to see it? In that case, here is pictureperfect: See, share and organise your pictures how **you** want it: The gallery is highly customisable, so you can make it look exactly how you want it! ## All current features: - A picture list - Seeing the pictures enlarged - Copying to clipboard - Renaming pictures - Opening in the file explorer - Metadata editor/viewer - Settings: - Amount of columns to display - Distance between each picture (horizontal and vertical) - Scroll speed multiplier - Sorting method
## Planned Features: - Albums: A collection of images you can see together - Deleting ## Updates This mod is currently in beta, so some features are missing or may be unstable, altough the majority is added. Expect updates with bug patches and new features frequently. Bug reports can be posted [here](https://github.com/ItsNukea/Picture-Perfect/issues) ## Dependencies - Cloth config - Mod menu ## Notice Updates may be coming out slower for about a month, until the end of June, because of my exams upcoming soon
